gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/269)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/269)
text: إِنَّ مِنْ عَلَامَاتِ شِرْكِ الشَّيْطَانِ الَّذِي لَا يُشَكُّ فِيهِ أَنْ يَكُونَ فَحَّاشاً لَا يُبَالِي مَا قَالَ وَ لَا مَا قِيلَ فِيهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ibn Fazzal, from Abu Al Magra, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘From the signs of association of the Satan<sup>la</sup> in which there is no doubt is the one would become immoral, not caring what he says nor what is said regarding him’.
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from ibn Faddal from abu al-Maghra’ from abu Basir from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Of the signs of the association of Satan with a person, without any doubt, is that he becomes abusive and is no more concerned about what he says or what is said about him.”’
